title: Expanded Weather2 Dynamics
description: Expanded Weather2 Dynamics is a NeoForge 1.21.1 addon for Weather2 that adds deeper tornado dynamics, radar tools, SPC-style outlooks, fictional TOR/SVR alerts, damage surveys, and survival-friendly storm damage.
body:
Expanded Weather2 Dynamics is a NeoForge 1.21.1 addon for Weather2 that expands severe storms with deeper tornado dynamics, radar tools, storm alerts, SPC-style risk outlooks, and survival-friendly storm damage.

This addon keeps Weather2 as the core weather system, while adding extra server-side behavior, visuals, blocks, and configuration for more intense severe-weather gameplay.

Features

Dynamic tornado width, bending, merging, satellite tornadoes, and anti-cyclonic tornado support
Supercell structure visuals with hook/circulation-aware radar behavior
Radar block, anemometer, weather alert siren, SPC risk block, and damage surveyor
Automatic fictional EF-style damage survey results with tornado IDs and track display
Tree debarking, stronger ground scouring, cycloidal marks, and capped terrain damage
Fictional TOR/SVR warning system and SPC-style outlook categories
Multiplayer-focused server-authoritative behavior and configurable performance limits
Advancements, recipes, loot tables, textures, and survival-placeable weather tools
Required

Minecraft 1.21.1
NeoForge
Weather2
CoroUtil
Note
All alerts, survey ratings, SPC outlooks, and warning products are fictional in-game systems. They are not official real-world weather information.
Forge is experimental; you may experience bugs.

Vynvortex has tried this mod https://youtu.be/VItPN36mLlc?is=ibDZ_jkiBIYRdS2X
